mapper.select:
SELECT a.area_seq, a.area_name, a.area_cd, c.cm_nm AS area_cd_nm, a.area_zip_no, a.area_addr, a.area_dtl_addr, a.area_latitude, a.area_longitude, a.area_desc, a.use_flag, a.rgst_user_id, a.rgst_date_time, a.upt_user_id, a.upt_date_time, b.user_name AS last_modify_user_name FROM TB_AREA a LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_USER b ON a.upt_user_id = b.user_id LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_COM_CD c ON a.area_cd = c.cm_std_cd WHERE 1=1
AND UPPER(a.area_name) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{areaName}) || '%'
AND UPPER(c.cm_nm) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{areaCdName}) || '%'
AND a.use_flag = 'Y'
ORDER BY a.area_seq

SELECT a.sector_seq, a.area_seq, a.sector_name, a.sector_cd, b.cm_nm AS sector_cd_nm, a.sector_desc, a.rgst_user_id, a.rgst_date_time, a.upt_user_id, a.upt_date_time, a.srt_sq, a.use_flag, a.x_axis, a.y_axis FROM TB_SECTOR a LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_COM_CD b ON a.sector_cd = b.cm_std_cd WHERE a.area_seq = #{areaSeq} ORDER BY a.srt_sq
